questions.question: Explain regular stochastic matrices and their significance.
questions.modelAnswer: A regular stochastic matrix has a power with all positive entries, ensuring a unique steady-state vector. This guarantees long-term convergence regardless of initial state, vital for applications like PageRank.

questions.question: Determine if P = [[0, 1], [0.5, 0.5]] is regular.
questions.modelAnswer: Yes. P² = [[0.5, 0.5], [0.25, 0.75]] has all positive entries.

questions.question: Describe finding the steady-state vector for a 2x2 matrix.
questions.modelAnswer: Solve πP = π with Σπ_i = 1. For P = [[a, 1-a], [b, 1-b]], π = [b/(a+b), a/(a+b)].
